results.description: File path typo: idnex.ts instead of index.ts

issues.title: CLI file path is incorrect (`src/cli/idnex.ts` does not exist)
issues.description: The plan instructs edits in `src/cli/idnex.ts`, but the repository contains `src/cli/index.ts` as the actual CLI entrypoint (including commander setup). Following the current path would fail because the target file is missing.

results.description: Step contradicts Key Decisions (custom handler vs commander built-in)

issues.title: Conflicting implementation directives for `--version`
issues.description: The plan gives mutually incompatible instructions: Step 1 says to add a custom `--version` handler and avoid Commander’s built-in version support, while Step 2 and Key Decisions require using `program.version()`. This leaves no single unambiguous implementation path and risks duplicate/conflicting version handling behavior.

results.description: Missing step: how does program.version() receive the version string?

issues.title: Missing explicit step to source version from package metadata
issues.description: The plan’s steps only say to register `--version` and update help in `src/cli/index.ts`, while verification requires `notes --version` to print the version from `package.json`. There is no explicit step describing how that value is loaded. In this repo, `tsconfig.json` uses `rootDir: "src"`, `include: ["src/**/*.ts"]`, and does not enable `resolveJsonModule`, so a straightforward JSON import from `src/cli/index.ts` is not currently covered by the plan and can lead to implementation drift or build issues depending on approach.

issues.title: Manual help update is likely unnecessary with Commander
issues.description: With Commander, calling `program.version(...)` automatically registers `-V, --version` and includes it in generated `--help` output. Treating help as a separate manual edit step can lead to redundant or duplicate help customization.
